title: Squarespace Webhook Notification
description: Represents the payload structure of a webhook notification sent by Squarespace when a subscribed event occurs on a merchant site. All notifications share a common envelope with a topic-specific data payload. Authenticity is verified via the Squarespace-Signature header using HMAC-SHA256.

notificationId.description: Unique identifier for this specific notification delivery instance

websiteId.description: Unique identifier of the Squarespace website that generated the event

subscriptionId.description: Unique identifier of the webhook subscription that matched the event

topic.description: The event topic that triggered this notification

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the notification was generated by Squarespace

data.description: Topic-specific event data payload. Structure varies based on the topic value.

OrderCreateData.description: Data payload for an order.create notification containing the ID of the newly created order

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the newly created order. Use with the Orders API to retrieve full order details.

OrderUpdateData.description: Data payload for an order.update notification containing the updated order ID and description of the change

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the order that was updated

orderUpdate.description: Human-readable string describing what was updated on the order, such as fulfillment status changes

ExtensionUninstallData.description: Data payload for an extension.uninstall notification

clientId.description: The OAuth client ID of the Squarespace Extension that was uninstalled from the merchant site

WebhookSubscription.description: A webhook subscription record configured via the Webhook Subscriptions API

id.description: Unique identifier for the webhook subscription

endpointUrl.description: The publicly accessible HTTPS URL where notifications are delivered

topics.description: List of event topics this subscription is configured to receive

secret.description: HMAC-SHA256 signing secret returned only at creation or secret rotation. Must be stored securely.

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the subscription was created

updatedOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the subscription was last modified
